matchingDescription: UK workplace pension provider, technology-driven retirement saving

variants.text: Smart Pension is one of the UK's fastest-growing workplace pension providers, setting a new standard for technology-powered retirement saving.
Manage your workplace pension digitally with Smart Pension — built on technology that makes tracking and growing your retirement savings simple.
Just started a new job? Smart Pension is a fast-growing UK workplace pension provider focused on making retirement saving straightforward.
Smart Pension helps UK employees build retirement savings over the long term through a technology-powered workplace pension.
Join Smart Pension — a UK workplace pension provider setting a new standard for how technology can power retirement savings.
